something rolled, i.e. a heap of stone or dung (plural ruins), by analogy, a spring of water (plural waves)

53.gl: between (repeated before each noun, often with other particles); also as a conjunction, either...or
53.kj: among, asunder, at, between (-twixt...and), [phrase] from (the widest), [idiom] in, out of, whether (it be...or), within.
53.dv: (sometimes in the plural masculine or feminine); properly, the constructive form of an otherwise unused noun from H995 (בִּין); a distinction; but use

53.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
53.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

53.gl: to seven oneself, i.e. swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times)
53.kj: adjure, charge (by an oath, with an oath), feed to the full (by mistake for H7646 (שָׂבַע)), take an oath, [idiom] straitly, (cause to, make to) swear.
53.dv: a primitive root; properly to be complete, but used only as a denominative from H7651 (שֶׁבַע);

53.gl: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
53.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

53.gl: father, in a literal and immediate, or figurative and remote application
53.kj: chief, (fore-) father(-less), [idiom] patrimony, principal. Compare names in 'Abi-'.

53.gl: a (sudden) alarm (properly, the object feared, by implication, the feeling)

54.gl: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
54.kj: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, re
54.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

54.gl: to stop (usually over night); by implication, to stay permanently; hence (in a bad sense) to be obstinate (especially in words, to complain)
54.kj: abide (all night), continue, dwell, endure, grudge, be left, lie all night, (cause to) lodge (all night, in, -ing, this night), (make to) murmur, remain, tarry (all night, that nig

54.gl: a brother (used in the widest sense of literal relationship and metaphorical affinity or resemblance (like father))
54.kj: another, brother(-ly); kindred, like, other. Compare also the proper names beginning with 'Ah-' or 'Ahi-'.
[idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

54.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
54.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
54.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

54.gl: properly, a slaughter, i.e. the flesh of an animal; by implication, a sacrifice (the victim or the act)
